body_text:
25:27 â November 21, 2025
Update to the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, as described below.
The Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only.
Document Library
Status
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule
2725
Section 1.7, FX Drafts Fees
We removed the FX Notes Plus subsection because the new FX Notes vendor (Globex 2000) does not offer drafts. We also updated the title of the section.
Revised
Section 2.3, ATM and POS Fees
We updated the Cirrus Network fees. Specifically, we corrected the âMastercard Network Connectivityâ fee. We added the VISA System Access fee and the Mastercard QMR-Acquirer Volume Assessment fee. These are not new fees and were effective in 2024.
Section 2.4, Interchange Fees
We simplified this section.
Section 2.14, Interac e-Transfer Fees
Because the Interac e-Transfer fees are highly nuanced, they are no longer published in this fee schedule. A detailed breakdown of your fees will be provided in a monthly billing report starting in mid-December 2025. Please contact your senior account executive for questions about your Interac e-transfer fees.
Section 5.1, Currency Fees
We updated the wording in the FX Notes section because foreign currencies are now provided through a new vendor (Globex 2000). We removed fees for home delivery, cash letters, and cheque collection as they are not available through Globex 2000.
